sections.paragraph:
ματαιολόγος, ον (s. prec. entry; Telestes Lyr. [IV b.c.] 1, 9 Diehl; Vett. Val. 301, 11; Physiogn. I 379, 10; II 231, 5) talking idly, subst. ὁ μ. an idle talker, windbag Tit 1:10.—TW.

prec. prec. = preceding

Telestes Telestes , s. AnthLG; V/IV b.c.—List 5

Diehl Diehl , ed., s. AnthLG—List 5

Physiogn. Physiogn. = Scriptores Physiognomici, various dates—List 5

subst. subst. = substantive(ly)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 621
